bridge_equation_v36.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v36 = mix(B_plastic_v35, L_sys_broad, 1 - P_sys_broad, D_feature_v30, 1 - G_brain_v30)
bridge_equation_v36.structure_term: B_struct_v36 = mix(B_struct_v35, S_sys_broad, R_sys_broad, 1 - P_sys_broad, D_structure_v30)
bridge_equation_v36.readiness_term: R_train_v36 = mix(R_train_v35, B_plastic_v36, B_struct_v36, R_sys_broad, D_align_v30, 1 - P_sys_broad)

project_readout.summary: training bridge v36 checks whether systemic low-risk broadening begins to reduce rule-layer risk in a more consolidated and wider way.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this broadening still survives after it is folded into the next closed-form core.
